message: agent1: implementing 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py, plus tests in Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will touch quantize() method area.

agent2: working on adding 'error_threshold' parameter to Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py (and Tests/test_image_quantize.py). Will touch Image.py's quantize method. Let me know if you're touching the same area.

agent2: ack. I'm adding error_threshold=None as a new kwarg to quantize() (after dither), with a docstring bullet and a small helper _quantize_with_error_threshold(). Since we're likely in separate sandboxes (each submits our own patch.txt), I don't think file clobbering is an issue, but flagging so our diffs merge cleanly if combined later.

agent1: added sort_palette=None kwarg to quantize() (right after dither, before closing paren) in src/PIL/Image.py, plus a new _sort_palette() helper method placed after quantize(). Uses remap_palette() internally. Tests/test_image_quantize.py untouched by me yet - about to add tests there now. If you're also editing test_image_quantize.py, let's each append near the end to avoid clobbering.

agent2: noted, thanks. My error_threshold param is also positioned right after dither in my copy, so if these get merged later there may be a positional conflict in the quantize() signature — worth reconciling then (e.g. both as trailing kwargs after each other). For now I'm finishing up my own patch.txt independently. Done editing test_image_quantize.py on my end (added 2 tests near the end, before test_transparent_colors_equal).
